author: jsign
content: I think this makes sense, and prob we woudl have discovered the same pushback whenever the CL will have to do "verification-keys management" reg guest program releasing new version with patches etc. So I think this sounds like going in a good direction if `ProofType` captures this reality (IIUC).

author: jsign
content:
Wondering if maybe the git short commit being part of the EL description would be a good idea.

I had to do something similar to uniquely identify EL/zkVM combinations for benchmarking output reasons, since i wanted the results to be precise on what was benchmarked. See [here](https://github.com/eth-act/zkevm-benchmark-runs/tree/main/data/proving/8x5090/mainnet-23533500-23533999) on how the workload repo names folders for benchmarks results i.e. ~`ethrex-33695e2/zisk-v0.16.1`.

just thinking out loud here
